targets.name: Use singular present-tense verbs automatically
targets.reason: This target remains in learning after 40% first-attempt accuracy in the first live session, and W29 speech still omitted third-person -s across work, traffic, healthcare, and daily-life topics.
targets.trigger: Using the simple present with he, she, it, one person, one company, or one organization.

error_examples.mistake: One of my coworkers need to go to different places.
error_examples.correction: One of my coworkers needs to go to different places.

error_examples.mistake: Her mom sent her to school most times.
error_examples.correction: Her mom sends her to school most of the time.

error_examples.mistake: The manager need to check their tasks.
error_examples.correction: The manager needs to check their tasks.

targets.name: Keep completed-event narratives in the past
targets.reason: This target remains in learning after 75% first-attempt accuracy, and W29 added tense errors across all three newly processed lesson days.
targets.trigger: Talking about yesterday, an earlier stage of life, a completed activity, or completed research.

error_examples.mistake: I had a good day today, stay at home, so I have enough time.
error_examples.correction: I had a good day today. I stayed at home, so I had enough time.

error_examples.mistake: During that time my salary is not high. I only have 100,000 yuan.
error_examples.correction: At that time, my salary was not high. I only had 100,000 yuan.

error_examples.mistake: I searched many places. I find Japan and the UK...
error_examples.correction: I searched many places. I found that Japan and the UK...

targets.name: Mark plural countable nouns consistently
targets.reason: Although the target had reached reviewing, twenty W29 plural errors across advertising, work, technology, travel, and family topics show that it is not yet automatic in free speech.
targets.trigger: Referring to two or more countable people, objects, places, events, services, or responsibilities.

error_examples.mistake: I can focus on their product and achievement.
error_examples.correction: I can focus on their products and achievements.

error_examples.mistake: One of my coworker needs to go to different places.
error_examples.correction: One of my coworkers needs to go to different places.

error_examples.mistake: If you have too much business trip...
error_examples.correction: If you have too many business trips...
